What We Offer

Three ways to enjoy
Eldorado Tourist Park

Whether you need secure storage, a permanent base, or a weekend getaway — we have the perfect option for you.

Secure Facility

Boat & Caravan Storage

Safe, affordable off-site storage for your boat, caravan, or RV. Short or long term options available.

From $15 / week
Residency

Long Term Rental

Powered caravan & RV sites or 1-bedroom cabins for those wanting to call Eldorado home on a fixed-term basis.

From $39 / night
Holiday Escape

Short Stay / Holiday

Powered en-suite sites for short breaks. 1 hour from Melbourne and 30 min from the Great Ocean Road.

From $39 / night
Check Availability
Secure 24/7
Boat & Caravan Storage

Safe, affordable storage you can trust

Whether it's between fishing seasons or you simply need more space at home, our secure storage facility offers peace of mind at an unbeatable price. Short-term and long-term options available, subject to availability.

  • Boats, caravans, RVs and trailers accepted
  • Secure, fenced facility with regular on-site staff
  • Flexible short-term & long-term agreements
  • Easy access location — just off Ballarat Road, Batesford
  • Storage from just $15 per week
Long Term Rental

Make Eldorado your permanent home

Looking for an affordable, community-focused place to live? We offer fixed-term residency options including 1-bedroom cabins and fully-powered caravan & RV sites. Subject to availability and an application process.

  • 1-bedroom cabins available
  • Powered caravan & RV sites with en-suites
  • Access to all park facilities
  • Community centre for residents
  • Pet-friendly environment
  • Fixed-term lease agreements
Community Living
Short Stay & Holiday

The perfect base for your next adventure

All our powered sites include their own en-suite — so whether it's a weekend escape or a longer holiday, you'll be comfortable. We're surrounded by the best Victoria has to offer.

  • All sites powered with private en-suite
  • 1 hour from Melbourne CBD
  • 30 min to the start of the Great Ocean Road
  • Close to the Bellarine Peninsula and Goldfields
  • Pet friendly — dogs welcome
  • Swimming pool, BBQ areas, children's playground
Book Your Stay Now
Park Facilities

Everything you need,
right on-site

Swimming Pool

Cool off during your stay in our sparkling park pool

BBQ Areas

Communal BBQ facilities for alfresco dining

Guest Laundry

On-site laundry facilities for long-stay guests

Community Centre

A shared space for residents to connect and socialise

Children's Playground

Safe play area for the kids to enjoy

Basketball Court

Half-court basketball for active guests

En-Suite Sites

Every powered site has its own private en-suite bathroom

Dump Point

RV & caravan dump point on-site for self-contained travellers

Why Eldorado?

A park that works for every lifestyle

01

Unbeatable Location

Set on Ballarat Road, Batesford — 10 minutes from central Geelong, 1 hour from Melbourne and 30 minutes to the Great Ocean Road.

02

Expanding to 30 Acres

Our park is growing. From 10 to 30 acres, Eldorado is investing in its future — and in yours. More space, more facilities, more possibilities.

03

One of the Few Pet Friendly Parks

One of the only pet-friendly caravan parks in the Geelong region. Bring the whole family — four-legged members included.

What our guests are saying

★★★★★

"Great location for exploring the Great Ocean Road and Geelong. Sites are spacious and having an en-suite on each site is brilliant. Will definitely be back!"

"We store our boat here and it couldn't be easier. The price is very fair and the team is always friendly. Never had any issues in 3 years of using them."

Boat & Caravan Storage

Storage Enquiry

Tell us about what you need to store and we'll get back to you promptly with availability and pricing.

Enquiry Sent!

Thanks for your storage enquiry. Our team will review your details and be in touch within 1 business day to discuss availability and next steps.

Residency

Long Term Rental Application

Complete this form to express interest in long-term residency. An application process and T&Cs apply. We'll be in touch to discuss availability.

By submitting this form you acknowledge that all long-term residency placements are subject to availability, an application process, and Eldorado TP's Terms & Conditions.

Application Received!

Thank you for your interest in long-term residency at Eldorado Tourist Park. We'll review your application and contact you within 2 business days.
